narrative:
Lake 20 (precinct in Stark County) has 865 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
